nasb.text: “You shall not take the name of the Lord your God in vain, for the Lord will not leave him unpunished who takes His name in vain.

esv.text: “You shall not take the name of the Lord your God in vain, for the Lord will not hold him guiltless who takes his name in vain.

cnv.text: “不可妄稱耶和華你　神的名，因為妄稱耶和華的名的，耶和華必不以他為無罪。

ccb.text: “不可妄用你上帝耶和华的名，违者必被耶和华定罪。
